lines.english: Why was the girl in hospital?
lines.raw: Why was the girl in hospital? | 女孩为什么住院了？

lines.english: Nearly a week passed before
lines.raw: Nearly a week passed before | 将近一个星期过去了

lines.english: the girl was able to explain
lines.raw: the girl was able to explain | 女孩才能解释

lines.english: what had happened to her.
lines.raw: what had happened to her. | 发生在她身上的事情。

lines.english: One afternoon she set out
lines.raw: One afternoon she set out | 一个下午，她出发了

lines.english: from the coast in a small boat
lines.raw: from the coast in a small boat | 乘小船从海岸出发

lines.english: and was caught in a storm.
lines.raw: and was caught in a storm. | 结果遭遇了暴风雨。

lines.english: Towards evening,
lines.raw: Towards evening, | 傍晚时分，

lines.english: the boat struck a rock and
lines.raw: the boat struck a rock and | 小船撞上了一块礁石

lines.english: the girl jumped into the sea.
lines.raw: the girl jumped into the sea. | 女孩跳入了海中。

lines.english: Then she swam to the shore
lines.raw: Then she swam to the shore | 然后她游向岸边

lines.english: after spending the whole night in the water.
lines.raw: after spending the whole night in the water. | 在水里待了一整夜。

lines.english: During that time she covered
lines.raw: During that time she covered | 在那段时间里，她游了

lines.english: a distance of eight miles.
lines.raw: a distance of eight miles. | 八英里的距离。

lines.english: Early next morning,
lines.raw: Early next morning, | 第二天一早，

lines.english: she saw a light ahead.
lines.raw: she saw a light ahead. | 她看到前方有灯光。

lines.english: She knew she was near the shore
lines.raw: She knew she was near the shore | 她知道她靠近岸边了

lines.english: because the light was high up on the cliffs.
lines.chinese: 因为灯光在高高的悬崖上。
lines.raw: because the light was high up on the cliffs. | 因为灯光在高高的悬崖上。

lines.english: On arriving at the shore,
lines.raw: On arriving at the shore, | 到达岸边后，

lines.english: the girl struggled up the cliff towards
lines.raw: the girl struggled up the cliff towards | 女孩艰难地爬上悬崖

lines.english: the light she had seen.
lines.raw: the light she had seen. | 朝着她看到的灯光。

lines.english: That was all she remembered.
lines.chinese: 这就是她所记得的一切。
lines.raw: That was all she remembered. | 这就是她所记得的一切。

lines.english: When she woke up a day later,
lines.raw: When she woke up a day later, | 一天后她醒来时，

lines.english: she found herself in hospital.
lines.chinese: 她发现自己躺在医院里。
lines.raw: she found herself in hospital. | 她发现自己躺在医院里。
